Periscope Hotel

★★★★☆
🍸 Rooftop Bar
from €160 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Design-forward boutique hotel in fashionable Kolonaki. Modern aesthetic with rooftop terrace.

Who Should Consider Periscope Hotel

Periscope Hotel is a 4-star upscale price-signal hotel in Kolonaki, with no Acropolis-view signal in the current dataset and a rooftop-bar signal. It is tagged for design, boutique, hip.

  • Compare the area on the Kolonaki hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • Compare it with other Athens rooftop bar hotels.

Amenities

RooftopBarWiFiBreakfast

✓ Pros

  • Great design
  • Trendy area
  • Good breakfast

✗ Cons

  • Small rooms
  • No major views

Location

Located in Kolonaki, 15-20 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 15-20 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro

Quick Facts

  • Neighborhood: Kolonaki
  • Star Rating: 4 stars
  • Price Range: €128-240
  • Acropolis View: No
